title: evolvulus nummularius
intro: Evolvulus nummularius, also known as Dwarf Blue Sage or Blue Daze, is a flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas and the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Evolvulus nummularius has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared using various herbal methods, including tea, infusions, and topical applications, and is also used in some traditional remedies as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
